note: Two reputable PDR bases (avto-ekzamen.org.ua, testpdr.online) with identical option wording both mark option 3 correct per PDR clause 13.2 (vehicles <=40 km/h outside settlements keep distance so overtakers can return to lane). vodiy.ua/pdr/13 confirms the 13.2 rule text. Stored answer 2 ('залежно від дорожньої обстановки') is a distractor; correct is 3 (alt_read=3 agrees).
